successMessage: You strike a match and light the candle. A pure white flame cuts through the shadows, this must be the right light.
You wrap the cloth around the candle. The light dies, leaving only a smothered stump. This doesn’t feel right...
You light the cloth on fire. It flares briefly, then crumbles to ash. Whatever this is, it’s not a blessed flame.
As you slide the missing page back into the torn book, the text glows faintly. The knowledge feels whole again.
You scribble all over the page in panic. The words twist into nonsense... this won’t impress the Guide.
You scrawl ink across the already damaged book. Whatever wisdom it held is now completely ruined.
You carefully assemble the bread and cheese into a strange, glowing meal. The air hums with quiet energy.
You force the rotten meat between the bread. The sandwich oozes and reeks—this cannot be the offering the Guide wants.
You pair the cheese with rotting meat. The plate looks cursed, not blessed.
